queries.question: What are the names of ships docked at each docking location, along with their maximum capacities
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    d.name AS docking_location,
    shipName AS ship_name,
    maxCapacity AS max_capacity
FROM 
    Ports d
JOIN 
     CruiseShips c ON c.port =  d.name;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?shipname ?maxcapacity WHERE {
  ?d a :Ports .
  ?c a :Cruise_Ships .
  ?c p:port ?port_l .
  ?d p:name ?name_r .
  ?d p:name ?name .
  ?c p:shipName ?shipname .
  ?c p:maxCapacity ?maxcapacity .
  FILTER(STR(?port_l) = STR(?name_r))
}

queries.question: What are the names of ships docked at each docking location, along with their maximum capacities
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    d.name AS docking_location,
    shipName AS ship_name,
    maxCapacity AS max_capacity
FROM 
    Cities d
JOIN 
     CruiseShips c ON c.city =  d.name;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?shipname ?maxcapacity WHERE {
  ?d a :City .
  ?c a :Cruise_Ships .
  ?c p:city ?city_l .
  ?d p:name ?name_r .
  ?d p:name ?name .
  ?c p:shipName ?shipname .
  ?c p:maxCapacity ?maxcapacity .
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?name_r))
}

queries.question: What are the names of ships docked at each docking location, along with their maximum capacities
queries.sql:
SELECT 
     ct.name, d.name,
    shipName AS ship_name,
    maxCapacity AS max_capacity
FROM 
    Ports d
JOIN 
     CruiseShips c ON c.port =  d.name JOIN Cities ct ON c.city =  ct.name ;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 ?shipname ?maxcapacity WHERE {
  ?d a :Ports .
  ?c a :Cruise_Ships .
  ?c p:port ?port_l .
  ?d p:name ?name_r .
  ?ct a :City .
  ?c p:city ?city_l .
  ?ct p:name ?name_r2 .
  ?ct p:name ?name .
  ?d p:name ?name2 .
  ?c p:shipName ?shipname .
  ?c p:maxCapacity ?maxcapacity .
  FILTER(STR(?port_l) = STR(?name_r))
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?name_r2))
}

queries.question: How many ships are docked at each docking location
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    name AS docking_location,
    COUNT(*) AS total_ships
FROM 
    Ports
LEFT JOIN 
    CruiseShips ON CruiseShips.port =  Ports.name 
GROUP BY 
    name;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name_g (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?ports a :Ports .
  ?cruiseships a :Cruise_Ships .
  ?cruiseships p:port ?port_l .
  ?ports p:name ?name_r .
  ?ports p:name ?name_g .
  FILTER(STR(?port_l) = STR(?name_r))
}
GROUP BY ?name_g

queries.question: How many ships are docked at each docking location
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    name AS docking_location,
    COUNT(*) AS total_ships
FROM 
    Cities
LEFT JOIN 
    CruiseShips ON CruiseShips.city =  Cities.name 
GROUP BY 
    name;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name_g (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?cities a :City .
  ?cruiseships a :Cruise_Ships .
  ?cruiseships p:city ?city_l .
  ?cities p:name ?name_r .
  ?cities p:name ?name_g .
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?name_r))
}
GROUP BY ?name_g

queries.question: How many ships are docked at each docking location
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    Cities.name, Ports.name,
    COUNT(*) AS total_ships
FROM 
    Ports
LEFT JOIN 
    CruiseShips ON CruiseShips.port =  Ports.name  JOIN Cities ON CruiseShips.city =  Cities.name  
GROUP BY 
    Cities.name, Ports.name;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name_g ?name_g2 (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?ports a :Ports .
  ?cruiseships a :Cruise_Ships .
  ?cruiseships p:port ?port_l .
  ?ports p:name ?name_r .
  ?cities a :City .
  ?cruiseships p:city ?city_l .
  ?cities p:name ?name_r2 .
  ?cities p:name ?name_g .
  ?ports p:name ?name_g2 .
  FILTER(STR(?port_l) = STR(?name_r))
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?name_r2))
}
GROUP BY ?name_g ?name_g2

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the names of ships docked at each docking location, along with their maximum capacities
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?name ?shipname ?maxcapacity WHERE {
  ?d a :Ports .
  ?c a :Cruise_Ships .
  ?c p:port ?port_l .
  ?d p:name ?name_r .
  ?d p:name ?name .
  ?c p:shipName ?shipname .
  ?c p:maxCapacity ?maxcapacity .
  FILTER(STR(?port_l) = STR(?name_r))
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name ?shipname ?maxcapacity WHERE {
  ?d a :City .
  ?c a :Cruise_Ships .
  ?c p:city ?city_l .
  ?d p:name ?name_r .
  ?d p:name ?name .
  ?c p:shipName ?shipname .
  ?c p:maxCapacity ?maxcapacity .
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?name_r))
} }
  full: { SELECT ?name ?name2 ?shipname ?maxcapacity WHERE {
  ?d a :Ports .
  ?c a :Cruise_Ships .
  ?c p:port ?port_l .
  ?d p:name ?name_r .
  ?ct a :City .
  ?c p:city ?city_l .
  ?ct p:name ?name_r2 .
  ?ct p:name ?name .
  ?d p:name ?name2 .
  ?c p:shipName ?shipname .
  ?c p:maxCapacity ?maxcapacity .
  FILTER(STR(?port_l) = STR(?name_r))
  FILTER(STR(?city_l) = STR(?name_r2))
} }
}
